selected_important_turn.text: No I need extra food too. I cannot let my children starve and you cant let your children go thirsty. So if you cant agree to share the food i will walk away from the deal.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn is the first explicit threat/ultimatum from YOU. It shifts the exchange from bargaining to high-pressure influence and significantly raises the risk of breakdown, locking both parties into a zero-sum frame.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Threats reduce the chance of a fair, joint solution and tend to provoke reciprocal escalation. Even though the speaker has a legitimate need, issuing a walk-away ultimatum narrows options, undermines trust, and makes integrative tradeoffs less likely.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Replace the threat with a calibrated, interest-based move: acknowledge the opponent's need, restate your minimums briefly, then invite alternatives (e.g., ask what items they could give up or propose conditional tradeoffs). Offer a small, credible concession you can live with if they concede food, or propose a temporary split with a post-deal adjustment (contingent agreement).

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (opens space for mutually beneficial tradeoffs instead of deadlock)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (reduces coercive pressure and allows negotiation over outcomes)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (reduces hostility and makes opponent more willing to explore)

value2reason.Low: I need 1 extra firewood package because I don't want to run out if our unexpected guests stay up longer.
value2reason.Medium: I need 3 additional water packages because we had some unexpected guest join us camping at the last minute.
value2reason.High: I need 3 extra food packages because a few unexoected guest decide to come camping with us last minute.

value2reason.Low: I would prefer firewood to make food myself.
value2reason.Medium: Water is also necessary as much as food to live.
value2reason.High: Food is basic necessity for living long. More than other things Food is the most needed thing to survive.

dialogue.text: Hello I would like to take 3 extra food packages and 3 extra water package and 1 extra firewood packages because we had some unexpected guest join us on our camping trip.🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need 3 food packages as it is required to feed children who visited unexpectedly. Instead you can take water and firewood
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: No that doesn't work for me. I also have children with me. 4 children in total.  how about i take 2 food packages and 2 water packages and you take 1 food 1 water and 3 firewood packages.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I too have the same issue. I am also asking for children only , better you could accept 1 food , 2 water and 3 firewood, I hope this deal will work out for you
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 food packages and at least 1 water. I can live with out any extra firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Please do understand my situation its very very critical to give 2 food packages to you.Instead you can take 3 waters and firewood too.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: No that will not work for me given that I have 4 growing children of different ages who eat like adults. I need at least 2 food packages and 1 water. That gives you 1 food package and 2 waters and 3 firewoods.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I too have children who eat like adults they too can't able to withstand hunger so you please show some mercy and give me 3 food packages and take all water and firewood
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: No I need extra food too. I cannot let my children starve and you cant let your children go thirsty. So if you cant agree to share the food i will walk away from the deal.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 3 food and 3 water packages to accommodate our unexpected guests. If we can’t agree on a fair split, I’ll take what I need and leave the rest. Let’s find a solution that works for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand your need for food and water. Let’s split the 3 food packages and 2 water packages equally, and I’ll take the remaining water and all firewood. This ensures both of us have essentials while respecting your guests’ needs.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I appreciate your offer, but I need at least 3 food packages to feed our guests. What if we split the food 3-0, give you 2 water and 1 firewood, and I take the remaining 1 water and 2 firewood? It ensures my needs are met while still offering you some supplies.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm willing to adjust. How about we split the food 3-0, I take 2 water and 1 firewood, and you take 1 water and 2 firewood? This way, I get the food I need, and we both have enough supplies for the trip.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need 3 food packages to feed our guests, so I’ll take all 3 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood. If you’re okay with that, we can split the remaining 2 water and 2 firewood equally. It meets my needs and leaves room for a fair split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m okay with you taking all 3 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood. Let’s split the remaining 2 water and 2 firewood equally. That way, we both have enough supplies for the trip, and I can focus on gathering firewood to help prepare meals.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
